# Selected work

::: {.case-grid}

::: {.case-card}
![](images/workshop.jpg){.case-image}

### QGIS workshop for Trap & Trigger Ltd

Built reusable mapping workflows for operational teams, including data import standards and export-ready outputs.
:::

::: {.case-card}
![](images/kaki.jpg){.case-image}

### Kakī population modelling for the Department of Conservation

Developed an integrated modelling framework to support long-term planning and quantify uncertainty.
:::

:::
